hero.title: Beyond Catering
hero.subtitle: From stocking your office kitchen to bartending your next event — The Spot has you covered with services that go beyond traditional catering.

grabGo.paragraph1: Does your office need food options but not a full-service cafe? We've got you covered! The Spot stocks corporate office spaces with fresh, delicious grab & go items for your team's kitchen or break room.
grabGo.paragraph2Prefix: From sandwiches and salads to wraps, snacks, and drinks — we'll keep your grab & go case filled with quality options your team will love. We've curated our favorite vendors, all
grabGo.paragraph2Suffix: , because we believe in staying local and supporting our community.

benefitsCard.title: Colorado Proud
benefitsCard.description: We work exclusively with Colorado-based purveyors because quality matters and community matters more.
benefits: Fresh items delivered and stocked regularly
Perfect for offices without a full-service cafe

divider.headline: More Than Just Catering
divider.subtext: — Full-service solutions for every corporate need

bartending.certificationAlt: Colorado Responsible Alcohol Beverage Vendor Training Certificate - Mandy Smith
bartending.descriptionPrefix: Take your corporate events to the next level with professional bartending services. Mandy is
bartending.descriptionSuffix: in Responsible Alcohol Beverage Vendor Training — so whether it's a happy hour, holiday party, or client event, you get skilled, professional service with the same excellence and fun energy that defines The Spot.

services.title: Corporate Happy Hours
services.description: End the workday right with professionally crafted cocktails and mocktails for your team.

services.title: Holiday Parties
services.description: Make your holiday celebrations memorable with festive drinks and expert bartending.

services.title: Client Events
services.description: Impress clients with a premium bar experience that reflects your company's excellence.

services.title: Team Celebrations
services.description: Milestones, promotions, and wins deserve a toast — we'll make it special.

royalTreatment.subheadline: Every service we offer comes with the same values that make The Spot different.

items.title: Always On Time
items.description: Grab & go stocked on schedule. Bartenders arrive early and ready.

items.title: Excellence Everywhere
items.description: From product selection to service delivery — quality never wavers.

items.title: We Work With You
items.description: Customized solutions that fit your space, team, and budget.

finalCta.subheadline: Whether you need your office kitchen stocked or bartenders for your next event, Mandy and the team are ready to help.
